name: Reishi Ganoderma lucidum
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Neuroprotective, neurogenic, and anticholinergic evidence of Ganoderma lucidum cognitive effects: Crucial knowledge is still lacking
sources.citation: Mechanistic/preclinical-heavy cognitive review; explicitly highlights crucial knowledge gaps for future studies.

claimMap.claim: Reishi has mechanistic/preclinical cognitive interest, but current evidence is not strong enough for human nootropic claims.
claimMap.notes: Reishi has mechanistic/preclinical cognitive interest, but current evidence is not strong enough for human nootropic claims.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: No validated human nootropic dose from this source

dosage: Ganoderma lucidum; preclinical/mechanistic cognitive literature. No human dose/form claim from this source.
